problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to —, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
